ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account locked, please retry in {minutes} minutes
PROTECTED_USER: This demo account is protected and cannot be modified
REFRESH_TOKEN_REUSE_DETECTED: Refresh token reuse detected, please log in again
RSA_DECRYPT_FAILED: Password decryption failed, please retry with a fresh public key
NOTICE_NOT_PUBLISHED: Only published notices can be revoked
NOTICE_SEND_TIME_REQUIRED: Scheduled send requires a send time
NOTICE_SEND_TIME_PAST: Send time cannot be in the past
NOTICE_MQ_UNAVAILABLE: Message queue unavailable, please retry later
NOTICE_NOT_FAILED: Only failed notices can be retried
OAUTH_USER_INFO_FAILED: Failed to get OAuth user info
OAUTH_IDENTITY_ALREADY_BOUND: This third-party account is already bound to another user
OAUTH_PROVIDER_ALREADY_LINKED: This account has already linked this login method
OAUTH_CANNOT_UNBIND_LAST_IDENTITY: Cannot unbind the last login method
OAUTH_PENDING_INVALID: Authorization expired, please log in again
